commands.summary: Confirmed the adopted RepoPact records validate after adding project-specific safety invariants and the firmware acquisition work item.
Confirmed the Motorola One Hyper was visible in Android mode before rebooting to bootloader.

commands.command: & 'C:\Android\platform-tools\adb.exe' reboot bootloader; fastboot devices; fastboot getvar product; fastboot getvar current-slot
commands.summary: Rebooted to bootloader and confirmed product def with current slot a; this was a mode change only, not a flash/write operation.
Captured bootloader variables with sensitive identifiers redacted.
Checked first-party RSA/LMSA cache locations; no firmware artifacts appeared.

commands.command: Invoke-WebRequest HalabTech and Filewale exact package pages
commands.summary: Recorded exact third-party candidate metadata for the target build; neither package was downloaded or verified.
